widgets_values: Set OPENCV_IO_ENABLE_OPENEXR=1 in your shell before launching ComfyUI, otherwise save_exr will fail
EXR output is best viewed in DJV — standard image viewers won't display linear HDR correctly.
equires ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-hdr-0.9.safetensors from Lightricks/LTX-2.3-22b-IC-LoRA-HDR. Place in models/loras/

The flow will generate the closest 8XF-1 in the input video length

Expected runinng times on H1 machine

Full HD 1080*1920
 161 frames 100 secs
 241 frames 152 secs

in case of OOM use tile_size of 768
temporal size 16
Exposure adjusts the SDR preview only (in stops, ±10 EV). Does not affect hdr_linear or the saved EXR.
